sections.heading: What to consider when choosing halloween candy
paragraphs: Occasion candy decisions come down to three practical factors: who it is for, how it will be shared, and whether it needs to travel or store well.
Getting these right makes the page more useful than a generic top-ten list.
bullets: Match flavour profile and format to the audience (kids, adults, mixed groups).
Choose share-friendly pack sizes over large single-serve bags for group settings.
Check heat sensitivity and packaging if the candy needs to travel or sit out.

faq_items.question: How much seasonal candy do I need for a group?
faq_items.answer: A useful rule for group occasions is 100–150 grams of mixed seasonal candy per person. Adjust up for longer events or younger kids who tend to eat more sweets.

faq_items.question: What makes halloween candy a good choice for this occasion?
faq_items.answer: The best halloween candy options are easy to share, suit a mixed age group, and come in formats that do not require cutting or portioning before serving.

faq_items.question: Where can I buy halloween candy in bulk online in Australia?
faq_items.answer: Australian confectionery stores that stock seasonal candy in event or bulk packs are the most practical option — compare pack size and delivery timing before ordering.
